resultList.dtldesc: Experience premium high-rise living with this expansive 5 BHK apartment in Siddhartha Vihar, Ghaziabad, located within the ultra-modern residential development T&T Eutopia. Designed to offer a luxurious and technology-driven lifestyle, this residence combines spacious interiors with advanced smart home features. Ideal for large families and discerning buyers, the property stands out for its elegant design, high-floor positioning, and exclusive living experience in one of the region’s rapidly developing residential hubs.::::Property Specifications::::This semi-furnished apartment spans a super built-up area of 2495 sq. ft, offering generous space for comfortable and upscale living. The layout is enhanced by three balconies that provide ample natural light, ventilation, and expansive views from the 23rd floor of a 26-storey tower. The apartment also includes a dedicated servant room, adding to its functionality. Designed with smart home features such as fingerprint access and automated systems, the residence reflects modern living standards. Being a resale unit under freehold ownership, it ensures complete ownership rights along with immediate usability.::::Facilities::::Situated in T&T Eutopia by T & T Group, the property offers a host of premium amenities focused on comfort, wellness, and technology. Residents enjoy access to a health club with steam and jacuzzi, clubhouse, swimming pool, landscaped gardens, and dedicated jogging and strolling tracks. Additional features such as smart home automation, advanced security systems, and themed architectural design enhance the living experience. The project also includes recreational facilities like sports courts, amphitheatre, and children’s play areas, ensuring a well-rounded lifestyle.::::Locality::::Siddhartha Vihar is an emerging residential locality in Ghaziabad, strategically located near the Delhi-Meerut Expressway and well-connected to Delhi, Noida, and Indirapuram. The area benefits from proximity to key commercial hubs, educational institutions, and healthcare facilities, making it a convenient choice for families. With easy access to major road networks and upcoming infrastructure developments, the locality continues to attract homebuyers seeking both connectivity and long-term growth potential.
